occupation: UK MD & Europe Commercial Lead at Bauer Media Outdoor UK
headline: UK MD & Europe Commercial Lead
summary:
Hi, my name is Richard and I am UK Managing Director & Europe Commercial Lead for Bauer Media Outdoor (previously Clear Channel UK & Europe).

I joined Clear Channel, as an intern, back in 2000 and progressed through various roles in the marketing, planning, trading & commercial departments. I now sits on both the European ExCo Board & UK ComCo.

I am passionate about media, advertising & out of  home. I believe that media, and especially ooh, can be both a platform for brands & a platform for good! Because with great powers comes great responsibility (where did I get that from?!?)

Love my fam: Kate, my wife, and our three beautiful kids, Charlotte, Henry & William. I am a proud Frenchman (& Londoner). Keen cyclist & basketballer to balance the good life ;-)

education.school: University of the West of England

recommendations:
Ben Price

I had the privilege of working closely with Richard during my time as Sales Operations Director, and I can confidently say hes one of the most adaptable leaders Ive had the pleasure of working for. During our time working together, we collaborated on several major transformation initiatives, and Richard was a true champion for change throughout. His leadership ensured these initiatives not only delivered impactful results but also engaged the teams involved, making the process smoother and more inclusive for everyone.As well as knowing the OOH market inside-out, he excels at balancing business objectives with genuine care for the people around him, he's always looking for the best possible outcomes for both the company and the #peoplebehindtheposters.Having held roles at many levels within the business, this enables him to foster an inclusive environment where every individual, regardless of their role or background, feels valued and empowered to contribute. His leadership style ensures that everyone has a voice and the opportunity to succeed. Hes built an exceptionally effective leadership team, fostering a culture where people feel valued, engaged, and motivated to perform at their best.Above all, Richard is just a great person to work with – approachable, considerate, and always driven to make a positive impact. If he ever leaves Clear Channel, he'd be a massive asset to any organisation!

Lee Malcolm

Richard is a man with great knowledge and experience in the OOH industry, not only that he seems to be able to apply that business intelligence in very strategical way, always looking to put one foot forward.Richard draws people to him , with his great charm and warm personality and I will always consider that it was a great privilege to have worked with him.

Ben Price

I had the privilege of working closely with Richard during my time as Sales Operations Director, and I can confidently say he’s one of the most adaptable leaders I’ve had the pleasure of working for. During our time working together, we collaborated on several major transformation initiatives, and Richard was a true champion for change throughout. His leadership ensured these initiatives not only delivered impactful results but also engaged the teams involved, making the process smoother and more inclusive for everyone. As well as knowing the OOH market inside-out, he excels at balancing business objectives with genuine care for the people around him, he's always looking for the best possible outcomes for both the company and the #peoplebehindtheposters. Having held roles at many levels within the business, this enables him to foster an inclusive environment where every individual, regardless of their role or background, feels valued and empowered to contribute. His leadership style ensures that everyone has a voice and the opportunity to succeed. He’s built an exceptionally effective leadership team, fostering a culture where people feel valued, engaged, and motivated to perform at their best. Above all, Richard is just a great person to work with – approachable, considerate, and always driven to make a positive impact. If he ever leaves Clear Channel, he'd be a massive asset to any organisation!
